title: Math Theory for AI Evolution
summary: A new mathematical theory models the evolution of self-designing AIs. This theory differs from biological evolution due to the directed nature of AI design.
body:
Researchers have introduced a mathematical theory to understand the evolution of artificial intelligence systems that improve themselves through recursive self-improvement. This theory is distinct from biological evolution, as AI design is strongly directed, unlike the random and reversible mutations in biological DNA. 

 The development of this theory is crucial, as it can help predict and shape the traits of future AI systems. By understanding how AI evolution works, researchers can better design and control the development of increasingly complex AI systems. 

 The implications of this theory are significant, and its development is expected to spark further research into the evolution of self-designing AIs. As AI systems become more prevalent and powerful, understanding their evolution will be essential for ensuring their safe and beneficial development.
twitterThread: 🚀 A new math theory for AI evolution is here! 🤖
Here's why this matters: AI design is directed, not random like biological evolution. This changes everything for predicting AI traits.
The wild part: AI evolution will be faster and more complex than biological evolution. Let that sink in.
This changes everything for AI development. We can now predict and shape AI traits like never before.
The future of AI is being written. This math theory is the first chapter.
standaloneTweet: A new math theory reveals the evolution of self-designing AIs will be faster and more complex than biological evolution! What does this mean for AI development? https://ainformed.dev/articles/math-theory-for-ai-evolution
